name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_srapc_uvw_a_bridge_all_data
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_srapc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_a_bridge_all_data' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`Last Modified` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Last Modified User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Construction Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Condition Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Latest Valuation Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Asset Identification Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Nominated Inspection - Next Scheduled` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Nominated Inspection - Last Inspection` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Scheduled Inspection - Next Scheduled` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Scheduled Inspection - Last Inspection` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Scheduled Inspection - Last Comment` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`Last Modified` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Last Modified User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Construction Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Condition Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Latest Valuation Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Asset Identification Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Nominated Inspection - Next Scheduled` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Nominated Inspection - Last Inspection` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Scheduled Inspection - Next Scheduled` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Scheduled Inspection - Last Inspection` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Scheduled Inspection - Last Comment` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Last Modified|Last Modified User|Construction Date|Condition Date|Latest Valuation Date|Asset Identification Date|Nominated Inspection - Next Scheduled|Nominated Inspection - Last Inspection|Scheduled Inspection - Next Scheduled|Scheduled Inspection - Last Inspection|Scheduled Inspection - Last Comment' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_srapc`.`uvw_a_bridge_all_data`

data_array: Last Modified|Last Modified User|Construction Date|Condition Date|Latest Valuation Date|Asset Identification Date|Nominated Inspection - Next Scheduled|Nominated Inspection - Last Inspection|Scheduled Inspection - Next Scheduled|Scheduled Inspection - Last Inspection|Scheduled Inspection - Last Comment
